title: Cardboard UI
description: Rounded and softer on the eye version of the Minecraft's UI
body:
![Minecraft Menu That Has Rounded Corners for Buttons.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2162e6d73c59ccc6378612a6b615da002be73bf0.png)

---

![Minecraft UI has sharp corners this texturepack will round them up to make it easier on the eyes, black outlines get slightly brighter to also help with that.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca6b6ea2608e2788b229f5a2d17d5f3ffcbebf36.png)
<details>Minecraft UI has sharp corners this texturepack will round them up to make it easier on the eyes, black outlines get slightly brighter to also help with that.</details>

---

![Rounded Corners make everything better <3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51fa700b3152b190b889e59f4d89b23c8944723f.png)
<details>Rounded Corners make everything better <3</details>

---

![We also changed some icons to make them smoother.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/569e59d5c45c65c9ec7dd07b6be70b353ecd63e7.png)
<details>We also changed some icons to make them smoother.</details>

---
